title: MakakitoSteadyState
description: Steady-state hypothesis: baseline conditions that must hold before a chaos experiment begins and should be restored afterward.

description.description: Optional description of the system state this hypothesis verifies.

thresholds.description: Ordered list of metric thresholds. All must pass for the hypothesis to hold.

Threshold.description: A single measurable condition that the system must satisfy.

metric.description: Metric path as understood by the runner's metrics collector (e.g. 'http.p99_latency_ms', 'service.error_rate').

operator.description: Comparison operator: lt (<), lte (≤), gt (>), gte (≥), eq (=).

value.description: Threshold value the metric is compared against using operator.

description.description: Optional human-readable explanation of why this threshold matters.
description.example: p99 latency must stay below 200 ms
